rows.label: tev042201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev042201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Wazdo about the food supply.

rows.label: tev042201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev042201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Wazdo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev042201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Wazdo about the food supply.

rows.label: tev042201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Wazdo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev042201_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Wazdo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0001
rows.name:
One good thing about
city is plentiful food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0002
rows.name:
But you need more giant slabs
of meat! Other food is
distraction. Makes me miss home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Though I did see tasty-looking meat slab
called "Tatsu." It even talked to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0004
rows.name:
But when I tried to eat Tatsu, little
girl yelled at me. Said that she
"had dibs." What does this mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0005
rows.name:
And how do I get talking meat slab
of my own? Are they sold in store?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Did you know beautiful
Bias female named Lavina?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0009
rows.name: Soon she will be fit to wed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I must have her as mate. I must
have wedding. Then I can dine
on piles of beast flesh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Have you never seen Bias wedding?
Whole clan devours beast flesh until
we nearly burst. Now that is living![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0012
rows.name:
I remember being captive in Dryland Cave
Fortress. Cavern Clan found traveling Nopon
merchant. Ended up eating him whole.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0013
rows.name:
He looked delicious... Er, but that is in
past! I know I am not permitted to eat Nopon.
But can I maybe take small bite from side?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Nopon named Tatsu is so round! He can
spare bit of side for worthy Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0015
rows.name: ...No? Maybe just lick then?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0019
rows.name: Urrrrgh... So full...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0020
rows.name:
I like that Leroy. He
bought me piles of meat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0021
rows.name:
...What? Lavina? It does not matter. I
cannot think of mates after so much meat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Maybe my weakness for flesh is limited to
kind you eat? Not sure. I should defeat lots
of enemies so Loda gives me even more meat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Grrrawww! Curse that puny Earth alien!
He tries to steal Lavina from me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0031
rows.name:
I admit he is brave. Perhaps
even worthy adversary. But I
will not let him prevail![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0032
rows.name:
I will marry Lavina! Then Loda will stuff
my face with heaps of meat at wedding![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev042201_MSG0033
rows.name: ...Er, and because of love. That too.[ST:wait ]
